observation_window.failure_reason: The monitoring execution environment again could not resolve snad-app.vercel.app, so fresh production UI, backend-status and unauthenticated /auth/me results could not be established for this cycle. A successful cycle cannot be credited without reproducible live endpoint evidence. The latest available BFF Auth Session Synthetic run 29580977962 remains failed at login; authenticated /me, refresh, session restoration, logout and post-logout rejection were not reached. In addition, the current main SHA dfde8b919dca8c1259875e433cbfbc38073c97bf has a failed Vercel deployment status caused by the build-rate limit and is not verified in production. The consecutive-success counter remains zero and REM-P0-002 remains open. This record classifies the endpoint result as a monitoring-runtime observation failure, not as proof that the production endpoints themselves were unavailable.

production_ui.error: DNS resolution failed in monitoring execution environment

backend_status.error: DNS resolution failed in monitoring execution environment

synthetic.failure: Fresh endpoint evidence was unavailable because the monitoring runtime could not resolve the production hostname. The latest available authenticated synthetic remains failed at login, and the current main SHA has not been deployed successfully to Vercel because of the build-rate limit.
